text: move alias-creation and claude-skill-setup steps into script

Could add a 'gittoc setup' or extend 'gittoc init' to handle skill symlink + git alias creation directly, rather than separate shell scripts. init already detects these (T-57 checklist). Making init --full or setup actually *do* the steps it currently only checks would be the cleanest approach. Avoids new scripts and keeps one entry point.
